name: slackbox
description: Collect Slack channel, user, search, mention, and thread context through a local MCP workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Collect Slack context for local workflows
interface.longDescription: Slackbox provides a local MCP server and routing skill for collecting Slack channel, user, search, mention, and thread context into local files. The MVP focuses on collection and retrieval, not analysis or reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use slackbox to collect Slack context
Fetch Slack channel messages for local review
